jd_text: Grow with Agthia – For the Better Agthia Group is one of the region’s leading Food & Beverage companies, with a growing international footprint. We are a publicly listed company on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange (ADX) and part of ADQ, one of the region’s largest holding companies. Rooted in Abu Dhabi since 1978, we've grown into a global presence, operating in countries including the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Oman, Egypt, Turkey, and Jordan. We’ve built a diverse portfolio of over 35 market-leading brands across Water & Food, Snacking, Protein & Frozen, and Agri-Business – touching the lives of millions of consumers in more than 65 global markets. With sustainability at the core of our innovations, we’ve pioneered several world-first products, setting new benchmarks in industry and meeting the evolving needs of communities worldwide. Over 12,000 people from more than 67 nationalities are at the heart of shaping our purpose-driven future, supported by an agile environment which encourages collaboration, creativity, and the freedom to make a real difference. With a competitive benefits package, genuine opportunities to advance, and a focus on continuous learning and development, we’re committed to supporting your growth as we work together to deliver excellence “For the Better.” Role Purpose • The Source-to-Pay End-to-End Lead / Procurement Transformation Director will lead the transformation of the end-to-end procurement value chain, driving seamless processes across sourcing, contracting, purchasing, supplier management, invoicing, and payment. Job Description End-to-End S2P Transformation Leadership • Own the end-to-end Source-to-Pay value chain across strategic sourcing, contract management, procure-to-pay operations, and supplier management • Define the target operating model for procurement Process Design & Standardization • Lead the redesign of global S2P processes in line with best practices • Establish process governance and global standards • Drive harmonization across regions and business units Procurement Technology Enablement • Lead the implementation and optimization of procurement platforms, including sourcing, contract lifecycle management, supplier management, procure-to-pay, and analytics tools • Ensure strong integration with ERP and finance systems Program & Transformation Leadership • Lead large-scale transformation programs across process, technology, and organizational change • Manage program governance, milestones, and value realization • Coordinate cross-functional teams across Procurement, Finance, IT, Shared Services, and external partners Supplier & Value Management • Strengthen supplier collaboration and performance management • Enable supplier onboarding and digital adoption • Enhance contract compliance and supplier governance Experience • 12 to 15 years of Procurement experience, including at least 3 years in a regional role within a multinational or complex organization • Proven experience in Lean and Continuous Improvement implementation Functional Knowledge • Strong end-to-end procurement expertise across P2P, PR-to-PO, vendor onboarding, and operational controls • Strong command of procurement governance, policies, SOPs, DoA, and audit requirements • Proficient in SAP, Ariba, and other digital procurement systems • Strong capability in KPI tracking, reporting, and data-driven decision-making • Experience leading transformation initiatives and capability-building programs Join us and be part of a team that's not just shaping the future of food and beverage but also making a meaningful impact on the world. Together, let's grow 'For the Better.'
